Strong foundation in Computer Science & Engineering with hands-on experience in enterprise-level development, REST API design, and modern frontend frameworks.Proficient in end-to-end development, from backend business logic to responsive UI design. about.funFact: Refactored a legacy .NET codebase that cut API response time by 60% — with all tests still green!

projects.title: ROJLEARN: Online Learning Management and Tracking System (LMS)
projects.description:
• Engineered and delivered a scalable learning platform supporting course management, exams, assignments, and progress tracking with smooth handling of multiple users
      • Designed and implemented robust APIs with advanced filtering, sorting, and pagination, enabling efficient course search and data retrieval
      • Built and integrated personalized course recommendation functionality based on user activity and course content, improving course discovery
      • Optimized data handling with structured query design and reduced redundant database calls, ensuring faster and consistent performance
      • Identified and resolved critical runtime issues using systematic debugging and logging mechanisms, improving application reliability and stability

projects.title: ROJBLOG: A Full-Stack Blog Website
projects.description:
• Architected a full-stack blog platform allowing users to create, read, update, and delete blog posts with robust database integration.
• Designed a user-friendly interface using React, HTML, and CSS to provide an engaging and responsive experience.
• Built the back-end with Node.js and Express.js, optimizing server-side processing and API management.
• Integrated MongoDB for efficient data storage, retrieval, and management, ensuring scalability and reliability.
• Implemented pagination and search functionalities to enhance user navigation and content discovery

projects.title: Smart Pool: A Ride Sharing Platform Based on Blockchain
projects.description:
A decentralized ride-sharing platform built on blockchain technology, offering secure and transparent peer-to-peer transportation services.
• Integrated smart contracts to automate fare calculations, payment processing, and reputation management, ensuring trust and transparency among users.
• Designed a user-friendly interface with intuitive navigation and real-time updates for seamless ride booking and management.
• Implemented secure authentication and authorization mechanisms to protect user data and ensure secure transactions.

projects.title: RojBill: Console-Based Customer & Billing System
projects.description:
• Developed a console-based customer management system in Python with database integration using SQLite.
• Implemented customer registration, billing, complaint management, and consumer handling with CRUD operations.
• Designed and managed relational database tables for customer, bill details, complaints, and consumer records.
• Developed admin functionalities, including adding, updating, deleting, and searching customer and consumer data.
• Ensured data integrity and security by implementing validation checks and marking deleted records as "Inactive" instead of permanent deletion.

projects.title: ParcelEase: Courier Management System
projects.description:
• Developed a console-based parcel booking and tracking system in Python with SQLite database integration for efficient delivery management.
• Implemented user authentication and role-based access control for customers, delivery officers, and administrators.
• Designed and managed relational database tables for user profiles, parcel bookings, tracking details, and payment records.
• Implemented CRUD operations for parcel booking, delivery status updates, tracking history, and scheduling pickup/drop-off times.
• Developed invoice generation functionality displaying booking details, service costs, and payment status.
• Ensured data validation and integrity by enforcing constraints on phone numbers, parcel weights, and pickup/drop-off timestamps.
• Optimized SQL queries for retrieving user booking history and tracking details within a given date range.
• Implemented exception handling and error messages to prevent database corruption and improve user experience.
